riskRegister.title: Connector activation routes are mutating by design
riskRegister.detail: Connector credential, test, activation, and deactivation endpoints exist. The verification harness inspects them statically and does not invoke them.

riskRegister.title: Notification test-event route is mutating
riskRegister.detail: A notification test-event route exists in the product API. The verification harness inspects route declarations only and never invokes that endpoint.

riskRegister.title: Observability controllers are not executed by the harness
riskRegister.detail: The proof bundle verifies observability files, routes, and admin gating statically. It does not execute telemetry, readiness, or deployment snapshots.

riskRegister.title: Workspace membership is inferred structurally
riskRegister.detail: The harness proves auth gating and file availability, but organization membership checks remain controller-level behavior that is not executed.
